name: Ubiquiti Fiber Strain Relief Kit
title: Ubiquiti Fiber Strain Relief Kit
short_description: The Fiber Strain Relief Kit stands as a robust and versatile solution for managing and protecting fiber optic cables. Its UV-resistant construction ensures durability and resilience against the elements, making it ideal for outdoor deployment. This kit seamlessly mounts on poles or walls, offering flexibility in placement and compatibility with various installation scenarios. The supported pole diameter range spanning from 35 to 60 mm.
description: The Fiber Strain Relief Kit features a detachable reel, that is designed to organize and reduce physical strain on fiber optic cabling. This reel helps to prevent tangling and excessive tension that can cause damage. The Fiber Strain Relief Kit effectively protects fiber optic cables, minimizing the risk of damage and ensuring seamless connectivity in outdoor environments. This kit extends the lifespan of fiber optic cabling, contributing to the overall reliability and efficiency of your network infrastructure.

detailed_description.heading: Unwavering Protection for Fiber Optic Cables
detailed_description.text: The Fiber Strain Relief Kit stands as a robust and versatile solution for managing and protecting fiber optic cables. Its UV-resistant construction ensures durability and resilience against the elements, making it ideal for outdoor deployment. This kit seamlessly mounts on poles or walls, offering flexibility in placement and compatibility with various installation scenarios. The supported pole diameter range spanning from 35 to 60 mm.

The Fiber Strain Relief Kit features a detachable reel, that is designed to organize and reduce physical strain on fiber optic cabling. This reel helps to prevent tangling and excessive tension that can cause damage. The Fiber Strain Relief Kit effectively protects fiber optic cables, minimizing the risk of damage and ensuring seamless connectivity in outdoor environments. This kit extends the lifespan of fiber optic cabling, contributing to the overall reliability and efficiency of your network infrastructure.

The kit is compatible with a wide range of Ubiquiti products and standard fiber optic cables, making it a versatile addition to any network deployment that uses Ubiquiti’s fiber solutions. It also meets relevant industry standards for safety and reliability, ensuring that it does not contribute to fire hazards or other safety risks.
